title: Chotta chotta ninaika lyrics engeyum eppodhum lyrics
stanzas:
Singer : Chinmayi  Sathya
Song: Chotta Chotta
Movie: Engeyum Eppodhum
Music: Sathya

Chotta chotta nanaiya vaithaai
sollaamal kodhikka vaithaai
ettaadha idathilen nenjai parakka vaithaai

Kitta thatta karaiya vaithaai
kittaamal alaiya vaithaai
Thittaamal thittith thaan
Un kaadhal unara vaithaai

Rayil varum, paalamaai
Aiyo endhan idhayam
Thada thada thadavena thudikka

Nee oru naal oru naal vidhaiyaai
Vandhu vizhundhaai kannukkulle
Vizhi paarkkum podhe maramaai
Indru ezhunthaai nenjukkulle
Ada ini enna nadakkum
Manam nadandhadhai nadikkum

Oru kutti poonai pola
Kaadhal etti paarkkuthe
Adhu acham madam naanam ellaam
Thatti paarkkudhe paarkkudhe
Paarkkudhe korkkudhe

Andha kadavul adadaa aangal
nenjai mezhugil seithaanadi
Adhu ovvoru nodiyum pennai
Kandaal urugida vaithaanadi
Intha mounathin mayakkam
Romba pidikkuthu enakkum
Un pechum moochum ennaith
thaakki vittuch chendrathe
Nee vittuch chendra nyaabagangal
Patrik kondathe kondathe
Kondathe vendrathe

Chotta chotta......

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song?

The song Chotta chotta ninaika expresses feelings of love and longing, capturing the essence of romantic emotions.

What is the context of the song in the movie?

In Engeyum Eppodhum, the song plays during a pivotal moment that highlights the romantic connection between the lead characters.

Who are the singers of this song?

The song features the melodious voices of Chinmayi and Sathya C.

Who composed the music for this song?

The music for Chotta chotta ninaika was composed by Sathya C.

When was the song released?

The song was released on October 15, 2011.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Chotta chotta ninaika, the protagonists express their deep feelings for each other through a melodic exchange that resonates with the audience. The song's romantic theme is beautifully complemented by the soothing voices of Chinmayi and Sathya C, creating an atmosphere of love and tenderness. It captures the essence of youthful romance and the joy of being in love. The heartfelt lyrics by Na Muthukumar further enhance the emotional depth of the song, making it a memorable piece in the film Engeyum Eppodhum.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Chotta chotta ninaika from Engeyum Eppodhum is a delightful melody that captures the essence of love and longing. With the enchanting voices of Chinmayi and Sathya C, this song beautifully blends heartfelt lyrics by Na Muthukumar with Sathya C's soothing music. Experience the magic of this romantic duet that resonates with anyone who has ever been in love.
stanzaMeanings: You have made me feel small and insignificant without saying anything. You have made my heart flutter in a place where it shouldn't be.
You have made me feel the waves without being close. Without hitting, you have made me feel your love.
As the train comes, my heart is in a state of panic. It feels like my heart is going to burst.
One day, you fell into my eyes like a seed. When I look into your eyes, it feels like today you have risen in my heart. What will happen now? My heart is following what it has felt.
Like a little kitten, love is looking at me. It has all the fear, pride, and shame. Just look at it, look at it, look at it closely.

That God has made our hearts melt. Every moment, when I see a woman, I feel like I am melting. This silence is very captivating for me. Your words and your breath have taken me away, and the memories you left behind are haunting me.
